instructions: After editing files in src/, invoke the test-runner subagent to verify no regressions were introduced.
After editing files in docs/sphinx/source/, invoke the doc-checker subagent to validate documentation.
When creating or modifying Python code, always use logging (logger.*) instead of print() statements.
Import constants from src/constants.py instead of hardcoding magic numbers.
All public functions must have Google-style docstrings with Args, Returns, and Raises sections.
Changes to src/ should include corresponding test updates in tests/ when adding new functionality.
